versions.version_description: Classic 80's pop-rock feel. Please follow the record for how these changes go by. Watch for the key change up a half step for the first chorus and from the second chorus through the outro. Ends on a strum of G#m7 that fades as it slides back down the neck.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 Meeting you with a view to a kill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
 Face to faces, secret places, feel the chill[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Nightfall covers me but you know the plans I'm making[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]E7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Still overseas, could it be the whole Earth opening wide[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
A sacred why, a mystery gaping inside[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
A week is why until we[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - to fatal sounds of broken dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 The choice for you is the view to a kill[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
 Between the shades assassination standing still[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Earth's crystal tears, the fall of snowflakes on your body[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
First time in years to drench your skin of lover's rosy stain[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
A chance to find the phoenix for the flame[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Ab[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
A chance to die but can we[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - to fatal sounds of broken dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]           [ch]Cm[/ch]
Dance into the fire - that fatal kiss is all we need[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Fm[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]       [ch]Cm[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
Dance into the fire - when all we see is the view to a kill[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch]
